setting: Late morning, after spending the night together, at home.
lyrics:
One touch and you got me stoned
Higher than I've ever known
You call the shots and I follow
Sun rise but the night still young
No words, but we speak in tongues
If you let me, I might say too much

Your touch blurred my vision
It's your world, and I'm just in it
Even sober I'm not thinkin' straight

'Cause I'm off my face, in love with you
I'm out my head, so into you
And I don't know how you do it
But I'm forever ruined by you, ooh, ooh, ooh

Can't sleep 'cause I'm way too buzzed
Too late, now you're in my blood
I don't hate the way you keep me up

Your touch blurred my vision
It's your world, and I'm just in it
Even sober I'm not thinkin' straight

'Cause I'm off my face, in love with you
I'm out my head, so into you
And I don't know how you do it
But I'm forever ruin by you, ooh, ooh, ooh

Ooh-ooh-ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh
Ooh-ooh-ooh, ooh, ooh
Ooh-ooh-ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh
Ooh-ooh-ooh, ooh, ooh

'Cause I'm off my face, in love with you
I'm out my head, so into you
And I don't know how you do it
But I'm forever ruined by you, ooh, ooh, ooh

By you, ooh, ooh, ooh

lyricsJa.en: One touch and you got me stoned
lyricsJa.ja: 一度触れられただけで 僕はハイになる

lyricsJa.en: Higher than I've ever known
lyricsJa.ja: これまでにないほど 高く舞い上がる

lyricsJa.en: You call the shots and I follow
lyricsJa.ja: 君がすべてを仕切り 僕はそれに従う

lyricsJa.en: Sun rise but the night still young
lyricsJa.ja: 日は昇るけれど 夜はまだ始まったばかり

lyricsJa.en: No words, but we speak in tongues
lyricsJa.ja: 言葉はなくても 僕らは魂で語り合う

lyricsJa.en: If you let me, I might say too much
lyricsJa.ja: 許されるなら 喋りすぎてしまうかもしれない

lyricsJa.en: Your touch blurred my vision
lyricsJa.ja: 君に触れられて 視界がぼやけていく

lyricsJa.en: It's your world, and I'm just in it
lyricsJa.ja: ここは君の世界で 僕はただそこにいるだけ

lyricsJa.en: Even sober I'm not thinkin' straight
lyricsJa.ja: しらふの時でさえ まともに考えられない

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause I'm off my face, in love with you
lyricsJa.ja: 君に恋して 僕は正気じゃないんだ

lyricsJa.en: I'm out my head, so into you
lyricsJa.ja: 理性を失うほど 君に夢中なんだ

lyricsJa.en: And I don't know how you do it
lyricsJa.ja: 君がどうやってるのか 分からないけれど

lyricsJa.en: But I'm forever ruined by you, ooh, ooh, ooh
lyricsJa.ja: 僕は永遠に君に骨抜きにされた ooh, ooh, ooh

lyricsJa.en: Can't sleep 'cause I'm way too buzzed
lyricsJa.ja: 酔いしれすぎて 眠りにつけない

lyricsJa.en: Too late, now you're in my blood
lyricsJa.ja: もう手遅れさ 君は僕の血の中に流れている

lyricsJa.en: I don't hate the way you keep me up
lyricsJa.ja: 君が僕を寝かせないのは 嫌いじゃないよ

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Wow, I'm still feeling a bit buzzed from last night.
sentences.displayHtml: Wow, I'm still feeling a bit buzzed from last night.

sentences.text: Didn't think the sun rise would catch us like this.
sentences.displayHtml: Didn't think the sun rise would catch us like this.

conversation.japanese: うわー、昨日の夜からまだちょっと【興奮してる】よ。まさか【朝日】を見るまでこんなふうに過ごすなんて思わなかったな。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Guess we really got carried away.
sentences.displayHtml: Guess we really got carried away.

conversation.japanese: 私も！【眠れない】んだ。私たち、本当に【夢中になりすぎた】ね。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: Honestly, one touch from you and I feel higher than I've ever known.
sentences.displayHtml: Honestly, one touch from you and I feel higher than I've ever known.

conversation.japanese: 正直、君に触れられると、なんだか【これまで経験したことないくらい高揚する】んだ。すごいよ。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Is that why you're not thinking straight?
sentences.displayHtml: Is that why you're not thinking straight?

sentences.text: You're being awfully sweet right now.
sentences.displayHtml: You're being awfully sweet right now.

conversation.japanese: だから【まともに考えられない】の？今、すごく甘いこと言ってるよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It's like your world, and I'm just in it now.
sentences.displayHtml: It's like your world, and I'm just in it now.

sentences.text: I might say too much if you let me.
sentences.displayHtml: I might say too much if you let me.

conversation.japanese: そうかもね。まるで【君の世界に、僕がいるだけ】みたいだ。このままだと【言い過ぎちゃう】かもしれない。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: Well, I'm definitely so into you too.
sentences.displayHtml: Well, I'm definitely so into you too.

sentences.text: And I don't know how you do it, but you make me feel like this.
sentences.displayHtml: And I don't know how you do it, but you make me feel like this.

conversation.japanese: うん、私も間違いなく【君に夢中】だよ。そして【どうしてそんなことができるのか分からない】けど、君は私をこんな気持ちにさせるの。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I feel like I'm completely off my face, in love with you.
sentences.displayHtml: I feel like I'm completely off my face, in love with you.

conversation.japanese: 完全に【我を忘れるくらい】、【君に恋してる】よ。君が僕をすっかり変えちゃった。
